'''Rensen''' was a [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] and commander of the ''[[Direption]]''. When [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Delak Krennel]] ordered him to raze a village that had housed a would-be [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] of the [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]], Rensen refused; Krennel crushed his throat with his prosthetic hand and gave command of the ''Direption'' to [[Vict Darron]].

{{Char-stub}}
